changes.description: 8-phase activation lifecycle: registration through terminal state, validation checks, governance constraints
6 states, 9 transitions, state machine rules, transient state handling, audit records
3 authorization sources, no autonomous activation rule, scope matching, denial handling
4 trigger types, trigger-to-re-evaluation flows, S-state advancement/regression, trigger governance

3 revocation types, version rollback, full overlay reset, replay chain preservation

3-point enforcement, class-claim compatibility matrix, class expansion governance
Activation sequencing, application order, re-evaluation serialization, interaction patterns
6 auditability properties, 15 event types, hash-chain integrity, mandatory disclosure
5 boundary types, certification matrix, per-phase enforcement, boundary evolution governance
Path identity confirmation, compliance matrix, design questions answered, architecture diagram
Pre-flight, scope, upstream references, 12 execution steps, governance compliance
